description: Style Note If you're looking for a sporty, casual tee which won't let you down in either looks or performance, then your search is over! This polo T-shirt from nike is made of a comfortable, breathable cotton with a touch of spandex to give a flattering, stretchy Fit. Product Details White polo T-shirt with graduating stripes of minty green tones, spread collar, three button placket, short sleeves and vents at hem, orange embroidered logo on the left chest Material and Care 95% cotton 5% spandex Machine wash cold with like colours Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron
